Examples.Title: Get credits
Examples.Description: Get the credits information for the api user
Examples.Code:
using var client = new LumaClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Credits.GetCreditsAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Luma;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Add audio to a generation
Examples.Description: Add audio to a generation by its ID
Examples.Code:
### Add audio to a generation
# @name addAudioToGeneration
POST {{host}}/generations/{{id}}/audio
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "generation_type": "add_audio",
  "prompt": "string",
  "negative_prompt": "string",
  "callback_url": "https://example.com"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Audio added to generation
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Create a generation
Examples.Description: Initiate a new generation with the provided prompt
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Luma;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Delete a generation
Examples.Description: Remove a specific generation by its ID
Examples.Code:
### Delete a generation
# @name deleteGeneration
DELETE {{host}}/generations/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 204
# Description: Generation deleted
# default
# Description: Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Generate an image
Examples.Description: Generate an image with the provided prompt

Examples.Title: Get concepts
Examples.Code:
using var client = new LumaClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Generations.GetConceptsAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Luma;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get a generation
Examples.Description: Retrieve details of a specific generation by its ID
Examples.Code:
### Get a generation
# @name getGeneration
GET {{host}}/generations/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Generation found
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List generations
Examples.Description: Retrieve a list of generations with optional filtering and sorting
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Luma;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Modify a video
Examples.Description: Modify a video with style transfer and prompt-based editing
Examples.Code:
### Modify a video
# @name modifyVideo
POST {{host}}/generations/video/modify
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "generation_type": "modify_video",
  "media": {
    "url": "https://example.com"
  },
  "first_frame": {
    "url": "https://example.com"
  },
  "model": "ray-2",
  "mode": "adhere_1",
  "prompt": "string",
  "callback_url": "https://example.com"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Video modified
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Reframe an image
Examples.Description: Reframe an image by its ID
Examples.Code:
### Reframe an image
# @name reframeImage
POST {{host}}/generations/image/reframe
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "generation_type": "reframe_image",
  "media": {
    "url": "https://example.com"
  },
  "model": "photon-1",
  "prompt": "",
  "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
  "grid_position_x": 0,
  "grid_position_y": 0,
  "x_start": 0,
  "x_end": 0,
  "y_start": 0,
  "y_end": 0,
  "resized_width": 0,
  "resized_height": 0,
  "format": "jpg",
  "callback_url": "https://example.com"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Image reframed
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Upscale a generation
Examples.Description: Upscale a generation by its ID
Examples.Code:
### Upscale a generation
# @name upscaleGeneration
POST {{host}}/generations/{{id}}/upscale
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "generation_type": "upscale_video",
  "resolution": "540p",
  "callback_url": "https://example.com"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Generation upscaled
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Error
# Content-Type: application/json
